document_metadata.zone_name: Dutch Village Road Mixed Use Zone

zone_section_start.title_label_raw: C-2C ZONE: DUTCH VILLAGE ROAD MIXED USE ZONE

zone_section_end_before.title_label_raw: C-2D ZONE : HERRING COVE ROAD RESIDENTIAL/MINOR COMMERCIAL ZONE

zone_class_reference.summary: C-2C is an established class of use zone.

excluded_subuses.use_name: motor vehicle repair shops not primarily engaged in providing service station facilities

permitted_uses.use_name: appliance and small scale repair shops

conditions: may include shoe repair shops, barber and beauty shops, dry cleaners, and funeral services
as defined by the Province of Nova Scotia Liquor Control Act

permitted_uses.use_name: any use accessory to any of the foregoing uses

prohibitions.summary: No development for any purpose other than one or more uses in 38BA(1).
No land or building use for any purpose other than one or more uses in 38BA(1).

incorporated_use_requirements.summary: Buildings used for existing R-1, R-2 and R-2TA uses shall comply with the requirements of their respective zones.

retail_and_general_controls.condition_text: lands in Area D on ZM-28 shall limit retail use under 38BA(1) to a maximum ground floor gross floor area of 650 square metres
for lands at 44-58 Main Avenue, any use permitted under 38BA(1), other than residential, is limited to the ground floor

controls.condition_text: maximum building depth shall be 50 metres
a building may exceed the maximum building depth if the following apply

subcontrols.condition_text: the height of the remainder of the building does not exceed 3 storeys
soft landscaping and amenity space is included on the rooftop of the remainder of the building
the building maintains side and rear yard setbacks of 3 m for all portions exceeding the maximum building depth
the land is shown on ZM-29, Plan Dutch Village Road Buildings May Exceed Maximum Building Depth

controls.condition_text: minimum front yard and flanking yard setbacks shall be 1.5 metres and maximum front yard and flanking yard setbacks shall be 6 metres
lands shown on ZM-30 are exempt from the maximum front yard setback requirement

maximum streetwall height shall be as shown on ZM-31 and shall not exceed the height shown in metres or the number of storeys, excluding rooftop architectural features, landscape elements and mechanical penthouses and equipment
the building shall be stepped back 3 m on all sides above the streetwall height
the building shall be setback 5 m from the side yards above the streetwall height
the streetwall shall extend a minimum of 65 percent of the lot frontage, or 65 percent of both street frontages on a corner lot
subject to clause (b), the maximum lot coverage shall be 75 percent
enclosed parking below grade may cover 100 percent of the lot area if the enclosed parking structure does not exceed an average height of 1 metre above grade within a required side or rear setback

retail_and_general_controls.condition_text: building height shall not exceed the maximum height shown on ZM-32; elevator enclosures and mechanical penthouse may exceed that height if the following apply

controls.condition_text: set back from the roof edge a minimum of 5 metres
do not exceed 5.5 metres above the maximum building height
limited to a maximum area of 30 percent of the total roof area on which they are located

retail_and_general_controls.condition_text: on lots with a lot depth of less than 30 m, the maximum height shall be 4 storeys

for lands with frontage on both Percy Street and Joseph Howe Drive or frontage on Percy Street and abutting the Chain of Lakes Trail, height means the vertical distance between the average grade adjoining the building or the Streetline Grade along Joseph Howe Drive, whichever provides the greater height, and the highest part of the roof
retail_and_general_controls.exception_text: the highest part of the roof excludes rooftop architectural features, landscape elements and non-habitable penthouses; on properties abutting the Chain of Lakes Trail, the Joseph Howe Drive Street Line may be substituted with the Chain of Lakes Trail property line for determining Streetline Grade

unit_mix_parking_and_design_controls.condition_text: apartment house uses shall include a mixture of dwelling unit types, with a minimum of 30 percent of dwelling units containing two or more bedrooms
bedroom-count requirements do not apply for residential multi-unit dwelling use that begins construction before 2028-04-01

controls.condition_text: vehicular parking shall be enclosed in a building or located to the rear or side yard of the building
notwithstanding subsection 9(d), parking ratios apply as follows

subcontrols.condition_text: 2 spaces per 100 m2 of gross floor area of office space
3 spaces per 100 m2 of gross floor area of retail/service store space
3 spaces per 100 m2 of gross floor area of restaurant space

controls.condition_text: where parking requirements result in a fraction, the requirement shall be rounded down to the nearest whole number
illuminated signs shall not cause a glare or hazard to motorists, pedestrians or neighbouring premises
fascia signs shall not extend beyond 15 cm on the extremity of a wall on which they are affixed
maximum combined size of fascia signs shall be no greater than 10 percent of the total area of the wall
aggregate area of all window signs shall not exceed 25 percent of the window or glass area of a door
signs on awnings shall not cover more than 25 percent of the awning area and text length shall not exceed 80 percent of the front valance length
no signs shall be permitted on the roof of a building

unit_mix_parking_and_design_controls.condition_text: no balcony shall be built closer than 2 m to a side or rear property line, excluding patios for dwelling units at grade

controls.condition_text: the ground floor of the streetwall shall be comprised of 60 percent glazing
the ground floor height of a commercial building shall be at least 4.5 m
commercial uses shall have separate exterior access from any access to residential uses
vinyl is prohibited
plywood is prohibited
concrete block is prohibited
EIFS where stucco is applied to rigid insulation is prohibited
darkly tinted or mirrored glass on the ground floor is prohibited, excluding spandrel panels
where lands abut any residential zone, a landscaping area 6 metres in depth shall be provided, reducible to 1 metre if a 1.9 metre fence is provided
controls.exception_text: for lands at 44-58 Main Avenue, a 1.9 metre opaque fence and landscaping area minimum 3 metres in depth is required along the eastern property boundary that abuts a residential zone

controls.condition_text: the landscaped area shall be grassed or may use natural ground covers and shall include trees, walls of natural materials, planters, and shrubs at a rate of one tree and three shrubs per 4.6 metres of required landscaping
existing trees and shrubs shall be incorporated where possible and may count toward the landscaping requirement

unit_mix_parking_and_design_controls.condition_text: landscaping is required for alteration of an existing building where the alteration increases the ground area by at least 20 percent
any building erected for any C-2C use shall landscape the front yard setback; a driveway may cross this area; this landscaped area shall comply with 38BL(1)(b) and 38BL(1)(c)
any building with an exposed roof slab of an underground parking structure protruding above grade shall provide no less than 60 percent soft landscaping on any exposed above grade portion

apartment house buildings shall provide amenity space at a rate of 10 m2 per unit, and shared housing uses at a rate of 5 m2 per bedroom, in the form of unit patios, balconies or terraces, and interior amenity space

controls.condition_text: fitness room of a minimum size of 40 m2
community room of a minimum size of 40 m2

unit_mix_parking_and_design_controls.condition_text: where an existing commercial building is deemed nonconforming, it may be extended, enlarged or altered if the change complies with the by-law or a variance is granted

controls.condition_text: lighting shall be directed away from any abutting residential zones
commercial refuse containers shall be enclosed in a structure screening them from the street and abutting residential zones
outdoor storage shall not be permitted
where lands abut a residential zone, a 1.9 m fence with a landscaping strip of minimum depth 1 metre shall be provided

unit_mix_parking_and_design_controls.condition_text: notwithstanding 38BL(1)(a), any service station shall require a minimum 2 metre wide strip of landscaped area along the street line not required for the curb cut or pedestrian entrance
through lots on Joseph Howe Drive shall have a streetwall extending a minimum of 65 percent of the lot frontage on Joseph Howe Drive and 50 percent on Percy Street

where surface parking is permitted for through lots along Percy Street, a landscaped area 6 metres in depth measured from the Percy Street street line shall be provided in accordance with 38BL(1)(c) and 38BL(1)(d)
lands identified under Schedule A, Table 1 shall be subject to the Interim Bonus Zoning Requirements found in Appendix A

open_issues.description: Section 38BL(4) contains source text reading 'C-ZC Zone', which appears to be a probable source or OCR error and should be checked against the PDF image before database ingestion.
